Please tell me I'm not the only one who sees this. (BTW NOT HATING OR ANYTHING ON ass_sass_sin 's bot just using it to show what I'm seeing of literally every single bot im seeing rn.)WHY IS THE PROFILE SO FUCKING LARGE 😀😀😀 IM SORRY BUT IT TAKES UP MY ENTIRE FUCKING SCREEN. HELP ITS KILLING ME.

And I asked other people and apparently I'm the only one seeing it...it used to be in like two different rows now it's just one big ass row <3. I kinda guessed it might be for people with impaired vision but I don't have discord or Twitter to know if they've said something about it. But idk it scared me for like a few seconds :] please tell me what happened if u know 🫃

ANYWAY. Currently annoying people with how much I talk about arcane but I have a little tiny tiny obsession with it, also crying cuz I watched ACT 3. I was totally not screaming at jinx in the cell and then Vi and Kaitlyn smashing in said cell later 😀 someone's actually gonna need to take me to a mental asylum ><.

Also, I read the second book in the inheritance games series and uhm...👀. That's all I gotta say for that, and I stole another book from my best friend because yeah 😍 trying to get myself to read powerless but idk how I feel about it 👉👈.

I NEED TO STOP USING EMOJIS LIKE A 14 YEAR OLD GIRL BUT ENJOY THE BOT!!!!
